_comment: U23/B-U9 decision-engine hardening -- committed routing regression corpus. Each entry feeds page_spec straight into ghl_method.classify_page and asserts the resulting method (and, where present, the detected widget kinds). Consumed by both tests/test_routing_corpus.py (pytest) and scripts/guard-ghl-method-decision.sh --corpus (CI guard). Every score/threshold arithmetic below was verified against tools/ghl_method.py's actual classify_page logic, not assumed.

entries.name: plain_static_hero
entries.description: Plain hero section, no scripts, no advanced CSS -- zero signals.

entries.name: long_copy_no_signals_still_direct
entries.description: A long static page (well under the byte cap) with no advanced markup.

page_spec.html:
Our Story

We help small businesses grow through better systems and support.

Founded in 2019, our team has served hundreds of clients.

entries.name: one_third_party_lib_stays_direct
entries.description: A single third-party lib does not trigger the soft signal (needs >1).

entries.name: two_third_party_libs_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: Two third-party libs score 2 (weight of the soft signal), below threshold 3.

entries.name: two_third_party_libs_plus_interactive_escalates
entries.description: Two third-party libs (score 2) + interactive fetch (score 2) = score 4 >= threshold 3 -> VERCEL_EMBED.

entries.name: explicit_complexity_advanced_hard_signal
entries.description: complexity:'advanced' is a hard signal (weight 3) that alone forces VERCEL_EMBED.

entries.name: explicit_complexity_advanced_case_insensitive
entries.description: The complexity check is case-insensitive.

entries.name: js_framework_react_hard_signal
entries.description: A non-empty js_frameworks list is a hard signal (weight 3) -> VERCEL_EMBED.

entries.name: js_framework_vue_hard_signal
entries.description: Any framework name triggers the same hard signal -- not react-specific.

entries.name: payload_over_max_bytes_hard_signal
entries.description: An HTML fragment over MAX_DIRECT_BYTES (256KB) forces VERCEL_EMBED regardless of any other field.

html_repeat.unit: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit.

entries.name: important_storm_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: A single css_fighting sub-signal contributes weight 1 (capped) -- below threshold 3.

entries.name: global_selectors_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: Global-selector count alone is weight 1 -- below threshold.

entries.name: font_face_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: font-face block count alone is weight 1 -- below threshold.

entries.name: two_of_three_css_signals_stays_direct
entries.description: Two of the three css_fighting sub-signals = weight 1+1=2, still below threshold 3.

entries.name: three_css_signals_reach_threshold
entries.description: All three css_fighting sub-signals fire = weight 1+1+1=3 >= threshold 3 -> VERCEL_EMBED.

entries.name: interactive_fetch_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: A single interactive behavior scores 2, below threshold 3.

entries.name: interactive_websocket_alone_stays_direct
entries.description: Same as fetch -- one behavior scores 2, below threshold.

entries.name: interactive_plus_one_css_signal_escalates
entries.description: interactive (score 2) + one css_fighting sub-signal (score 1) = 3 >= threshold -> VERCEL_EMBED.

entries.name: form_widget_on_simple_page_stays_direct
entries.description: A form block is detected as a WIDGET regardless of the page method; a simple page with a form block still routes DIRECT for its own content.

entries.name: calendar_widget_on_simple_page_stays_direct
entries.description: A calendar block is detected as a WIDGET (kind 'booking') regardless of page method.

entries.name: form_and_calendar_widgets_on_advanced_page
entries.description: Widgets are orthogonal to the page method: an ADVANCED page (hard signal) still detects both widget kinds, in form-then-calendar order.

entries.name: multiple_form_blocks_two_widgets
entries.description: Two form blocks in one spec produce two widget entries, both kind 'form'.
